content.body:
The Go CLI already provides validate, reindex, and stale detection.
Shell scripts and the Claude Code hook were redundant.

- Removed .leo/kb/scripts/ (validate.sh, build-index.sh, check-stale.sh)
- Removed .claude/hooks/validate-kb-doc.sh
- Cleaned .claude/settings.json (no hooks)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
content.subject: refactor: remove legacy shell scripts and hooks — CLI Go handles everything
